zh.Bristol, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托
zh.of Bristol, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托
zh.lifeSummary: William Pavy是John Pavy的兒子，於大約1390年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾。他於1426年9月之前與Joan Beauflour結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1466年在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年77歲。

zh-hans.Bristol, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托
zh-hans.of Bristol, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托
zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Pavy是John Pavy的儿子，于大约1390年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾。他于1426年9月之前与Joan Beauflour结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1466年在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pavy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Monique, Octave.
French (northern, mainly Pas-de-Calais): probably a nickname, metonymic occupational name or topographic name derived from Old French pavé ‘cobblestone’, also ‘paved lane’.
French (mainly southern): variant of Pavie, habitational name from the Italian city of Pavia (Pavie in French). This surname is very rare in southern France.

variants.name: Pavey
meanings: English (southern): from the female personal name Pavia (possibly Old French pavie ‘peach’ or Pavie ‘woman from Pavia’ in Italy). The surname became confused with Paver .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: William Pavy was born about 1390, in Gloucestershire, England as the son of John Pavy. He married Joan Beauflour before September 1426. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1466, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: William Pavy est né environ 1390, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, fils de John Pavy. Il a épousé Joan Beauflour avant septembre 1426. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1466, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William Pavy wurde um 1390 in Gloucestershire, England, als Sohn von John Pavy geboren. Er hat vor September 1426 Joan Beauflour geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1466 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: William Pavy è nato il circa 1390 nel Gloucestershire, England come figlio di John Pavy. Lui sposato Joan Beauflour prima del settembre 1426. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1466, nel Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.Bristol, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストル
ja.Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイア
ja.of Bristol, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストル
ja.lifeSummary: William Pavyは約1390年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでJohn Pavyの息子として生まれた。1426年9月以前にJoan Beauflourと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1466年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Pavy(은)는 대략 1390년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 John Pavy의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1426년 9월 이전 Joan Beauflour(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1466년 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Pavy nasceu aproximadamente 1390, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra filho de John Pavy. Ele casou-se com Joan Beauflour antes setembro de 1426. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1466, em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: William Pavy родился около 1390 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. Его отца звали John Pavy. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Beauflour перед сентябрь 1426 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1466 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: William Pavy nació aproximadamente 1390, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra como hijo de John Pavy. Se casó con Joan Beauflour antes de septiembre de 1426. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1466, en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años.
